creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
I recently upgraded two systems from 9.2 to 10.1. Now, on both systems, I always get a core dump when doing 'zpool import'.

One is a raidz2 pool of 6 devices.

The other is just a plain pool created from one device.

Other than the coredump, the systems & import seem to be fine.
